---
title: "GC Organization Name Resolution API"
format: 
  dashboard:
    theme: lumen
    embed-resources: true
---

```{r}
#| echo: false
library(tidyverse)
library(lubridate)
library(tsibble)
library(gt)

dashboard_start <- as_date("2026-04-27")  # When we first deployed
dashboard_end <- today() - days(1)

# Load the daily CSV
lambda_usage <- read_csv("lambda_usage_prod.csv") |>
  mutate(date = as.Date(date)) %>%
  filter(
    between(
      date,
      dashboard_start,
      dashboard_end
    )
  )

```

```{r}
# Aggregate to ISO weeks using yearweek
weekly <- lambda_usage |>
  mutate(
    year_week = yearweek(date)
  ) |>
  group_by(year_week) |>
  summarise(
    week_start = min(date),
    errors = sum(errors),
    throttles = sum(throttles),
    duration_avg_ms = weighted.mean(x = duration_avg_ms, w = invocations),
    invocations = sum(invocations),
    total = invocations + errors + throttles,
    concurrent_max = max(concurrent_max),
    .groups = "drop"
  ) |>
  arrange(week_start)
```

## Row {height="25%"}

```{r}
#| content: valuebox
#| title: "Total Invocations"
list(
  icon = "lightning-charge",
  color = "info",
  value = scales::comma(sum(weekly$invocations), accuracy = 1)
)
```

```{r}
#| content: valuebox
#| title: "Invocations Last Week"
list(
  icon = "graph-up",
  color = "primary",
  value = scales::comma(last(weekly$invocations), accuracy = 1)
)
```

```{r}
#| content: valuebox
#| title: "Errors Last Week"
total_errors <- last(weekly$errors)
error_rate <- total_errors / last(weekly$total)

list(
  icon = "exclamation-triangle",
  color = case_when(
    total_errors == 0 ~ "success",
    error_rate > 0.01 ~ "danger",
    TRUE ~ "warning"
  ),
  value = if (error_rate >= 0.001) {
    paste0(scales::comma(total_errors, accuracy = 1), " (", scales::percent(error_rate, accuracy = 0.1), ")")
  } else {
    scales::comma(total_errors, accuracy = 1)
  }
)
```

```{r}
#| content: valuebox
#| title: "Throttles Last Week"
total_throttles <- last(weekly$throttles)
throttle_rate <- total_throttles / last(weekly$total)
list(
  icon = "clock",
  color = case_when(
    total_throttles == 0 ~ "success",
    throttle_rate > 0.01 ~ "danger",
    TRUE ~ "warning"
  ),
  value = if (throttle_rate >= 0.001) {
    paste0(scales::comma(total_throttles, accuracy = 1), " (", scales::percent(throttle_rate, accuracy = 0.1), ")")
  } else {
    scales::comma(total_throttles, accuracy = 1)
  }
)
```

```{r}
#| content: valuebox
#| title: "Avg Duration (ms)"
current_duration <- last(weekly$duration_avg_ms)
mean_duration <- weighted.mean(x = weekly$duration_avg_ms, w = weekly$total)
sd_duration <- sd(weekly$duration_avg_ms)

list(
  icon = "hourglass",
  color = case_when(
    current_duration >= mean_duration + 2 * sd_duration ~ "danger",
    current_duration >= mean_duration + sd_duration ~ "warning",
    TRUE ~ "success"
  ),
  value = round(current_duration, 2)
)
```

## Row

```{r}
#| title: "Daily Usage"
lambda_usage |>
  select(-duration_avg_ms, -concurrent_max) |>
  pivot_longer(
    cols = c("invocations", "errors", "throttles"),
    names_to = "type",
    values_to = "n"
  ) |>
  ggplot(aes(x = date, y = n, fill = type)) +
  geom_col(alpha = 0.8) +
  scale_fill_manual(
    name = "",
    values = c(
      "invocations" = "steelblue",
      "errors" = "firebrick",
      "throttles" = "darkorange"
    )) +
  scale_y_continuous(labels = scales::comma) +
  scale_x_date(date_labels = "%b %d", date_breaks = "1 week") +
  labs(
    x = "",
    y = "Count",
    fill = "Type",
    subtitle = "Daily Invocations",
    title = "GC Organization Name Resolution API"
  ) +
  theme_bw()
```

```{r}
#| title: "Daily Duration"
lambda_usage |>
  ggplot(aes(x = date, y = duration_avg_ms)) +
  geom_point(color = "mediumseagreen", aes(size = invocations)) +
  scale_x_date(date_labels = "%b %d", date_breaks = "1 week") +
  labs(
    x = "",
    y = "Duration (ms)",
    subtitle = "Daily Duration",
    title = "GC Organization Name Resolution API"
  ) +
  scale_y_continuous(limits = c(0, NA)) +
  theme_bw()
```

## Row

```{r}
#| title: "Weekly Breakdown"
weekly |>
  gt() |>
  fmt_date(columns = week_start, date_style = "m_day_year") |>
  fmt_number(columns = c(invocations, errors, throttles, concurrent_max), decimals = 0) |>
  fmt_number(columns = duration_avg_ms, decimals = 2) |>
  cols_hide(c("year_week", "total")) |>
  cols_label(
    week_start = "Week Starting",
    invocations = "Invocations",
    errors = "Errors",
    throttles = "Throttles",
    duration_avg_ms = "Avg Duration (ms)",
    concurrent_max = "Max Concurrent"
  ) |>
  cols_align(align = "right", columns = c(invocations, errors, throttles, duration_avg_ms, concurrent_max)) |>
  cols_align(align = "left", columns = week_start)
```
